# MemoPear

> MemoPear is an AI-powered field intelligence and lead capture platform built for conference and trade show professionals. It turns in-person encounters into structured pipeline data using Gemini AI.

## What MemoPear does

- Captures contact information from business cards via camera (AI OCR)
- Transcribes spoken notes in real time using Google Gemini Live Audio
- Generates AI-written personalized follow-up emails per contact
- Exports leads to Google Sheets in one tap
- Supports team seat plans with shared pipeline access

## Public pages

- Home: https://go.memopear.com/
- Pricing: https://go.memopear.com/pricing
- Blog: https://go.memopear.com/blog
- Company: https://go.memopear.com/company
- Contact: https://go.memopear.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://go.memopear.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://go.memopear.com/terms

## Blog

The MemoPear blog publishes tactical lead-capture playbooks for the biggest conferences in high tech. Each article covers a specific event and how field marketers, field sales reps, founders, and exhibitors can capture, organize, and follow up on leads at it.

- Why the Rep With the Most Business Cards Has the Worst Follow-Up (2026-07-16): https://go.memopear.com/blog/why-more-business-cards-means-worse-follow-up — Why lead volume without in-the-moment context capture kills conference follow-up, and why speed and depth are not actually a tradeoff.
- VivaTech 2026 Paris: A Lead-Capture Guide for Startups & Scale-ups (2026-06-30): https://go.memopear.com/blog/vivatech-2026-paris-lead-capture-guide — Capturing investor, partner, and customer leads among 165,000+ attendees at Europe's biggest tech event in Paris.
- SaaStr Annual 2025: The Field Sales Lead-Capture Playbook (2025-09-09): https://go.memopear.com/blog/saastr-annual-2025-lead-capture-playbook — Turning 12,500+ B2B SaaS attendees in San Mateo into clean pipeline.
- Dreamforce 2025: Turning 40,000 Conversations Into Pipeline (2025-09-16): https://go.memopear.com/blog/dreamforce-2025-turn-conversations-into-pipeline — Capturing and following up on leads at Salesforce's flagship San Francisco event.
- Web Summit 2025 Lisbon: A Lead-Capture Guide for Startups (2025-11-10): https://go.memopear.com/blog/web-summit-2025-lisbon-lead-capture-guide — How founders capture investor and customer leads among 70,000+ attendees in Lisbon.
- AWS re:Invent 2025: Capturing Every Lead in the Vegas Chaos (2025-12-01): https://go.memopear.com/blog/aws-reinvent-2025-lead-capture-in-the-vegas-chaos — A field guide to capturing technical cloud leads across the spread-out Las Vegas venues.
- CES 2026 Lead-Capture Playbook (2026-01-09): https://go.memopear.com/blog/ces-2026-lead-capture-playbook — Qualifying the right leads from the 140,000+ attendee show floor in Las Vegas.
- MWC 2026 Barcelona: Capturing Global Telecom & Mobile Leads (2026-03-02): https://go.memopear.com/blog/mwc-2026-barcelona-lead-capture-guide — Accurately capturing international leads at Mobile World Congress.

## App pages (require sign-in, not indexed)

- Login / Sign up: https://go.memopear.com/login
- Gather (lead capture): https://go.memopear.com/gather
- Pipeline (saved leads): https://go.memopear.com/pipeline
- Profile: https://go.memopear.com/profile
- Team management: https://go.memopear.com/team

## Technology

- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite
- AI: Google Gemini (vision, live audio, text generation)
- Auth: Firebase Authentication
- Payments: Stripe
- Hosting: Google Cloud Run

## Contact

For questions about data use or API access, visit https://go.memopear.com/contact
